activation_results.reason: Input matches the description's canonical use case verbatim.
Create is a natural paraphrase of Build for the same PMax campaign task.
User explicitly names the skill, so it should fire.
SSH key forwarding is unrelated to Google Ads campaigns.
Asking what skills are is meta and out of scope for a PMax builder.

criterion_results.text: Australian English used throughout the narrative (colour, optimise, behaviour, organise)
criterion_results.evidence: Uses AUD, Australian winter, Aussie Made, dd/mm/yyyy dates, .com.au URLs — consistent Australian register.

criterion_results.text: Artefact is a working specification, not a hypothetical or placeholder
criterion_results.evidence: Concrete customer id, budget, bidding, asset-group themes, headlines, descriptions, feed filters, exclusions and readiness checklist with dates.
Header, Asset groups, URL expansion exclusions, Merchant Center feed filter, Readiness checklist, Next steps — all present.

judge_result.notes: Artefact is a production-ready PMax campaign spec with concrete budget, bidding, asset groups (themes, audience signals, headlines, descriptions, image/video briefs), URL exclusions, Merchant Center feed filter, readiness checklist and next steps. Australian English and AU conventions used throughout. All three criteria pass.
